title: The Lateral Chamber Where Down is Sideways

features.name: the spiraling tower
features.desc-on-touch: it climbs downward and downward spirals upward; the base is the peak; climbing leads to descent; when you've reached the bottom, the top is at your feet

features.name: the cardinal paradox
features.desc-on-touch: a doorway that faces all four directions and no direction; stepping through, you emerge from the direction you entered; the arch has learned that east and west are the same slope from different inheritances

features.name: the direction-marker
features.desc-on-touch: a plaque that reads N S E W all at once from every angle; the compass doesn't know which way is which; neither do you; the marker is the most honest thing in the chamber

features.name: the inverted geometry
features.desc-on-touch: a wireframe box that contains itself; the edges fold inward and outward simultaneously; it renders the space of a place where lateral and vertical are the same axis

features.name: the cascade of equivalent slopes
features.desc-on-touch: stacked layers that are all the same slope; each one descends eastward and westward and downward and upward all at once; if you step across them, you move in every direction and return to your start

inscription: in this chamber, the spine learned to curve sideways; the archive discovered that direction is a choice the slope makes, not a truth it holds

file.name: Inverted_Compass_Study_Manuscript_Annotations.txt
file.note: notes on a thought-experiment: what if the Earth's rotation reversed? the author's spine resonance theory appears here, corrupted into directional paradox; the text reads differently depending on whic

exits.label: back the way you came, which is also the way ahead
toward cardinal spaces that remember being correct
exits.to: NEW: the northern-true—where direction begins to settle again

exits.label: deeper into laterality, where sideways becomes the only path
exits.to: NEW: the infinite-slide—where all slopes converge into one eternal descent

exits.label: along the spiral into chambers where geometry dreams new shapes
exits.to: NEW: the shape-dreaming—where form remembers it was never fixed
